narration: Here's what science actually says about sepsis basics.

narration: Sepsis is a life-threatening response to infection. Think of it as the body going into overdrive.
visual_description: Context visual: Sepsis is a life-threatening response to infection. Think of it as the body going into overdrive.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Sepsis is a life-threatening response to infection. Think of it as the body going into overdrive.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Sepsis is a life-threatening response to infection. Think of it as the body going into overdrive.

narration: Symptoms can escalate quickly—fever, rapid heartbeat, confusion. Ignoring them? Risky.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Symptoms can escalate quickly—fever, rapid heartbeat, confusion. Ignoring them? Risky.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Symptoms can escalate quickly—fever, rapid heartbeat, confusion. Ignoring them? Risky.

narration: Research shows that early treatment can significantly improve survival rates. Timing is everything.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Research shows that early treatment can significantly improve survival rates. Timing is everything.

narration: So, if you notice signs of sepsis, act fast! Knowledge could save a life—yours or someone else's.
